Bash(cd "C:/Users/28208/.claude/projects/C--Users-28208-Documents-Obsidian-Vault/44bb591b-ba36-4c12-952d-426bb135583d/tool-results/" && python -c "
import fitz, sys, re
doc = fitz.open\('webfetch-1782027318513-2zs0o1.pdf'\)
full_text = ''
for i in range\(len\(doc\)\):
    full_text += doc[i].get_text\(\) + '\\n'
# Count VLN-related mentions
vlne = len\(re.findall\(r'Vision.and.Language Navigation', full_text, re.IGNORECASE\)\)
vlne2 = len\(re.findall\(r'\\bVLN\\b', full_text\)\)
r2r = len\(re.findall\(r'R2R|RxR', full_text\)\)
self_paced = len\(re.findall\(r'self.paced|self-paced|self paced', full_text, re.IGNORECASE\)\)
manager = len\(re.findall\(r'manager.{0,5}worker|worker.{0,5}manager', full_text, re.IGNORECASE\)\)
hierarchical = len\(re.findall\(r'hierarchical|hierarchy', full_text, re.IGNORECASE\)\)
rxr = len\(re.findall\(r'RxR|R2R', full_text\)\)
instruction = len\(re.findall\(r'instruction.{0,20}follow', full_text, re.IGNORECASE\)\)
sys.stdout.buffer.write\(f'VLN mentions: {vlne+vlne2}\\n'.encode\(\)\)
sys.stdout.buffer.write\(f'Self-paced mentions: {self_paced}\\n'.encode\(\)\)
sys.stdout.buffer.write\(f'Manager/Worker mentions: {manager}\\n'.encode\(\)\)
sys.stdout.buffer.write\(f'Hierarchical mentions: {hierarchical}\\n'.encode\(\)\)
sys.stdout.buffer.write\(f'R2R/RxR mentions: {r2r+rxr}\\n'.encode\(\)\)
sys.stdout.buffer.write\(f'Instruction-follow mentions: {instruction}\\n'.encode\(\)\)
sys.stdout.buffer.write\(f'Total pages: {len\(doc\)}\\n'.encode\(\)\)
# Print sections about curriculum
sys.stdout.buffer.write\(b'\\n=== Curriculum Strategy Description ===\\n'\)
idx = full_text.find\('Phase 1'\)
if idx > 0:
    sys.stdout.buffer.write\(full_text[idx:idx+1500].encode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)\)
")
